demo.banner_msg: Start your own baby's book — get your own custom domain.
welcome.name_meaning_default: A name chosen with love, meaning, and intention
welcome.parent_quote_default: From the moment we first saw your face, our world was never the same. This is your story — every moment, every milestone, every memory — written just for you.
before.title: Before You Arrived
before.subtitle: The months of anticipation, preparation, and love that came before your first breath.
birth.title: The Birth Story
birth.subtitle: The day the world changed. Written by the people who were there.
birth.perspective_title_default_2: "I was completely unprepared for how I felt..."
birthday.title: Your Birth Day
birthday.subtitle: The people, the place, and the first moments of the day you were born.
home.header_sub: The first time you crossed the threshold and made our house a home in a whole new way.
months.header_sub: Twelve months. Every milestone, every measurement, every moment that made up the most important year of your life so far. Click any month to open the full entry.
family.header_sub: The people who loved your child before they even had a name.
family.tree_label: The People Who Make Up Your World
family.tree_sub: Every person in this section is someone whose life changed the day you were born. They come from different places, carry different stories, and together they form the village that will help raise you.
firsts.header_sub: Every milestone is a door opening. Here are the ones we never want to forget.
moments.subtitle: The clips words can't capture — first steps, first words, the laugh.
holidays.subtitle: The holidays, cultural traditions, and family rituals that will mark every year of your life.
letters.subtitle: Words written across time, sealed with love, waiting for the day you're ready to read them.
vault.text_p1: Behind this lock are letters, memories, photos, and words written specifically for the adult you will become — not the child you are now. They were placed here with love and intention, and they will wait as long as they need to.
vault.text_p2: On your 18th birthday, this vault will open. Everything inside was written for you — and only for you.
recipes.header_sub: The flavors of home. The dishes that mark every celebration, every Sunday, every season.
recipes.intro_text: Food is memory. These are the recipes that will always mean home — the ones that fill a kitchen with a particular smell and a particular feeling.
keepsakes.header_sub: Drawings, awards, certificates, handprints — the small treasures that fade with time, kept safe right here.
keepsakes.intro_text: A box in the closet only holds so much. Take a photo, add a note about what it meant, and let go of the original knowing it lives on here.
password.subtitle: A Living Baby Book & Digital Heirloom
password.label: Enter the Site Password to Continue
password.hint: Enter the password shared by the site owner
expired.title: Subscription Expired — Legacy Odyssey
expired.heading: This Book is Currently Unavailable
expired.body_past_due: There was a problem processing the payment for this book. The book owner can update their payment method to restore access.
expired.body_canceled: The subscription for this book has been canceled. The book owner can reactivate their subscription to restore access.
expired.body_expired: The subscription for this book has expired. The book owner can reactivate their subscription to restore access.
suspended.title: Account Suspended — Legacy Odyssey
suspended.heading: This account has been suspended
suspended.subtitle_line1: The subscription for this Legacy Odyssey book has been cancelled.
suspended.subtitle_line2: All memories, photos, and content are safely preserved.
suspended.data_safe_intro: All of your book content and photos are being held securely.
suspended.preserved_until: Your memories will be preserved until
suspended.reinstate_before_date: Reinstate your account before that date to restore full access — nothing will be lost.
suspended.reinstate_anytime: Reinstate your account at any time to restore full access — nothing will be lost.
notfound.title: Book Not Found — Legacy Odyssey
notfound.heading: Book Not Found
notfound.body: This baby book doesn't exist or has been deactivated.
error.title: Error — Legacy Odyssey
error.heading: Something went wrong
settings.language_desc: Choose the app's language. Automatic follows your phone's language.
app.login.error_missing_credentials: Please enter your email and password.
app.signup.card_body_domain_pre: Every Legacy Odyssey subscription includes your own personal
app.signup.card_body_domain_mid: — so your baby's book lives at a real address like
app.signup.card_body_price_post: . Sign up takes 2 minutes on our website.
app.forgotpassword.success_subtitle: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox and follow the instructions.
app.forgotpassword.tip_no_email: Didn't receive an email? Check your spam folder, or try again with a different email address.
app.forgotpassword.title: Reset Password
app.forgotpassword.subtitle: Enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
app.help.alert_missing_message: Please fill in your name, email, and message.
app.help.alert_sent_message: Thanks! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
app.help.alert_error_message: Failed to send message. Please try emailing us directly at help@legacyodyssey.com
app.help.heading: How can we help?
app.help.subtext: Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
app.common.error_save: Failed to save. Please try again.
app.dashboard.free_plan_bar: Free Plan — Tap to upgrade for full access
app.dashboard.upgrade_message:
{section} is available on the paid plan.

Upgrade for $29 your first year to unlock all sections, add unlimited photos, and get your own custom domain.

app.managesections.title: Website Sections
app.managesections.subtitle: Choose which sections appear on your public website. Sections are automatically shown when you add content, but you can toggle them on or off here.
app.managesections.footer_note: Sections that are turned off will not appear in the navigation or content of your book website.
app.before.page_subtitle: The story of how we prepared for you
app.before.title_placeholder: e.g., Painting Clouds on the Ceiling

app.birthday.empty: No photos yet — add several at once below.
app.journey.page_subtitle: An optional story page — for adoption, surrogacy, fostering, and every path home
app.journey.photo_add_failed: Could not add the photo. Please try again.
app.journey.remove_photo_body: Remove this photo from the page?
app.journey.page_title_helper: Name it whatever fits — "The Adoption Story", "Our Surrogacy Story", etc. Leave blank for the default.
app.journey.intro_placeholder: A sentence or two to open the page.
app.journey.milestones_helper: Optional dated moments — the day you were matched, homecoming day, the day it was finalized.

app.celebrations.page_subtitle: Holidays, birthdays, traditions. Organized by year, with as many celebrations per year as you'd like.
app.celebrations.already_exists_msg: "{label}" is already in your year list.
app.celebrations.delete_year_msg: This will remove every celebration in this year, including all photos. This cannot be undone.

app.celebrations.long_press_hint: Long-press a year to delete it.
app.celebrationyear.page_subtitle: Add as many celebrations as you'd like — birthdays, holidays, special days.
app.celebrationyear.empty: No celebrations yet. Add your first one below.
app.celebrationdetail.date_format_msg: The date was saved as blank because the format wasn't YYYY-MM-DD. Try "2026-12-25" for December 25, 2026.

app.celebrationdetail.hint_eyebrow: Small text above the title on the published page.
app.celebrationdetail.hint_attendees: Comma-separated names. Each shows as a little tag on the published page.

app.moments.uploading_body: Your video is uploading in the background — you can keep using the app. We'll add it to your book when it's ready.
app.galleries.page_subtitle: Make your own photo galleries — name each one, up to 50 photos with captions.
app.galleries.empty: No galleries yet — create your first one below.

app.galleries.create_hint: You'll name it on the next page, where you add your photos.

app.circles.page_subtitle: Your Contact List and Circles — keep a private list of who can see the book, grouped into circles like “Grandparents.”
app.circles.error_import: Could not import contacts. Please try again.
app.circles.delete_circle_msg: Delete the “{name}” circle? Your contacts stay — they’re just removed from it.

app.circles.send_confirm_msg_many: {count} people will each get their own private link.
app.circles.send_update_desc: Let people know there’s something new in the book. Each person gets an email with their own private link — no password needed.
app.circles.rate_limit_note: One update per 10 minutes, so inboxes stay friendly.
app.circles.no_circles: No circles yet — create one below.
app.circles.no_contacts: No contacts yet — add the first person below.
app.circles.import_from_phone_desc: Pick people from your contacts instead of typing each one.

app.circles.no_device_contacts: No contacts found on this phone.

app.settings.logout_msg: Are you sure you want to log out?
app.settings.error_portal: Could not open subscription management. Please try again.
app.settings.cancelled_msg: Check your email for confirmation. You'll be signed out now.
app.settings.cancel_single_msg:
Cancel your Legacy Odyssey subscription?

• You keep access until your next renewal date
• Photos & stories preserved for 1 year — resubscribe anytime to restore
• Custom domain auto-renewal stops
• You will not be charged anything today
app.settings.cancel_all_msg:
This cancels every Legacy Odyssey site on your account.

• Each site keeps access until its own renewal date
• Photos & stories preserved for 1 year on every site
• Custom domain auto-renewals stop
• You will not be charged anything today
app.settings.confirm_promotion_msg:
{site} will become your new Primary site.

• Its billing rate stays the same until your current Primary's renewal date, then switches to the Primary rate
• You will not be charged anything today
• Your current Primary site will cancel at its next renewal
app.settings.primary_site_msg:
{message}

Which site should become your new Primary?
app.settings.no_active_sub_msg: Your account doesn't have an active subscription to cancel.
app.settings.multi_site_msg: You have {count} active sites. Which would you like to cancel?
app.settings.book_password_desc: Set a password that visitors need to view your book online.
app.settings.preview_desc: See how your book looks to visitors.
app.settings.upgrade_desc: Upgrade to access Coming Home, Month by Month, Our Family, Firsts, Celebrations, Letters, Recipes, and The Vault.
app.settings.billing_desc: View your plan, update billing details, or cancel your subscription.
app.settings.cancel_sub_desc: Cancel your Legacy Odyssey subscription. Your photos and stories will be safely kept for one year — you can reactivate anytime to restore everything. You will not be charged anything to cancel.
app.newwebsite.body1_before: Each Legacy Odyssey site is its own subscription with its own
app.newwebsite.body1_after: . Pick a name, claim the domain, and your new book is ready in minutes.
app.additionaldomain.body1_before: Each Legacy Odyssey site is its own subscription with its own
app.additionaldomain.body1_after: . Pick a name, claim the domain, and your new book is ready in minutes.
app.share.title: Share an update
app.share.desc: Tell your people there's something new — by text or email.
app.share.foot_note: Texts open your Messages app. Emails send each person a private link — no password.

Email this update to 1 person?

app.share.email_confirm_many:
